title: common values
description: Input contract for the externalSecret values. Validated by Helm against the consumer's `common` values section before rendering.

externalSecret.description: External Secrets Operator (ESO) resources rendered by the common chart: ExternalSecrets (pull), PushSecrets (push), and Password generators.

enabled.description: Master toggle for the externalSecret feature. When false, no ESO resources are rendered.

commonLabels.description: Labels added to metadata.labels of every rendered resource. A resource's own labels win on conflict.

commonAnnotations.description: Annotations added to metadata.annotations of every rendered resource. A resource's own annotations win on conflict.

secretStore.description: Chart-wide default SecretStore/ClusterSecretStore reference. Injected into every pull/push secret that does not override it with its own store reference.

generators.description: ESO Password generator resources, referenced by pull/push secrets via generatorRef to inject generated passwords.

enabled.description: Toggle for rendering the Password generators in this block.

passwords.description: Map of Password generators keyed by resource name (the key becomes metadata.name).

push.description: PushSecret resources that push data from a k8s Secret or generator into a SecretStore.

enabled.description: Toggle for rendering the PushSecrets in this block.

spec.description: Shared defaults merged into every entry of `secrets` (per-secret values win). Not rendered on its own, define the actual PushSecrets under `secrets`.

secrets.description: Map of PushSecrets keyed by resource name (the key becomes metadata.name and the default sourceSecretName).

pull.description: ExternalSecret resources that pull data from a SecretStore into a k8s Secret.

enabled.description: Toggle for rendering the ExternalSecrets in this block.

spec.description: Shared defaults merged into every entry of `secrets` (per-secret values win). Not rendered on its own, define the actual ExternalSecrets under `secrets`.

secrets.description: Map of ExternalSecrets keyed by resource name (the key becomes metadata.name and the default target.name).

storeRef.description: Reference to an ESO SecretStore or ClusterSecretStore.

kind.description: Kind of store. ClusterSecretStore is cluster-scoped; SecretStore is namespaced.

keys.description: Key mappings between the resulting k8s Secret and the remote provider.

name.description: Key name in the k8s Secret (secretKey). Also the default remote property when remoteKey is unset.

remoteKey.description: Property name in the remote provider to map to this key. Defaults to `name` when omitted.

spec.description: Password generator spec rendered verbatim (e.g. length, digits, symbols, noUpper, allowRepeat).

annotations.description: Annotations added to this generator's metadata.annotations.

labels.description: Labels added to this generator's metadata.labels.

namespace.description: Namespace for this generator. Defaults to the release namespace when omitted.

finalizers.description: Finalizers set on this generator's metadata.finalizers.

pullSecret.description: ESO ExternalSecret (external-secrets.io/v1) that pulls remote data into a k8s Secret.

path.description: Remote key/path in the provider to read from (remoteRef.key). Required unless a generatorRef is used.

targetName.description: Name of the resulting k8s Secret (spec.target.name). Defaults to the resource name.

secretStoreRef.description: Store to pull from. Overrides the chart-wide default `externalSecret.secretStore`.

keys.description: Data mappings from remote properties into the k8s Secret. Ignored when generatorRef is set.

generatorRef.description: Reference to a generator (dataFrom.sourceRef.generatorRef). When set, data is produced by the generator instead of from `keys`/`path`.

template.description: spec.target.template used to shape the resulting Secret (engineVersion, type, metadata, data, templateFrom).

refreshInterval.description: How often to reconcile from the provider (e.g. "1m", "2h30m"). Defaults to "1m".

refreshPolicy.description: When to refresh. Only rendered when explicitly set.

creationPolicy.description: Whether/how ESO creates the target Secret (spec.target.creationPolicy). Defaults to "Owner".

deletionPolicy.description: What happens to the target Secret when the source data disappears (spec.target.deletionPolicy). Defaults to "Delete".

conversionStrategy.description: How remote keys are converted to valid Secret keys (remoteRef.conversionStrategy). Defaults to "Default".

decodingStrategy.description: How remote values are decoded (remoteRef.decodingStrategy). Defaults to "None".

metadataPolicy.description: Whether to fetch provider metadata (remoteRef.metadataPolicy). Defaults to "None".

nullBytePolicy.description: How null bytes in remote values are handled (remoteRef.nullBytePolicy). Only rendered when explicitly set.

annotations.description: Annotations added to this ExternalSecret's metadata.annotations (merged over commonAnnotations).

labels.description: Labels added to this ExternalSecret's metadata.labels (merged over commonLabels).

namespace.description: Namespace for this ExternalSecret. Defaults to the release namespace when omitted.

finalizers.description: Finalizers set on this ExternalSecret's metadata.finalizers.

pushSecret.description: ESO PushSecret (external-secrets.io/v1alpha1) that pushes a k8s Secret or generator output into a SecretStore.

path.description: Remote key/path in the provider to push to (remoteRef.remoteKey). Required.

sourceSecretName.description: Name of the existing k8s Secret to push (selector.secret.name). Defaults to the resource name. Ignored when generatorRef is set.

secretStores.description: Stores to push to (spec.secretStoreRefs). Overrides the chart-wide default `externalSecret.secretStore`.

keys.description: Data mappings from the source Secret keys to remote properties.

generatorRef.description: Reference to a generator (selector.generatorRef). When set, generator output is pushed instead of an existing Secret.

refreshInterval.description: How often to reconcile the push (e.g. "1h"). Defaults to "1h".

deletionPolicy.description: What happens to the remote secret when the PushSecret is deleted (spec.deletionPolicy). Defaults to "Delete".

updatePolicy.description: Whether to overwrite existing remote secrets (spec.updatePolicy). Defaults to "IfNotExists".

conversionStrategy.description: How source keys are converted before push (data.conversionStrategy). Defaults to "None".

annotations.description: Annotations added to this PushSecret's metadata.annotations (merged over commonAnnotations).

labels.description: Labels added to this PushSecret's metadata.labels (merged over commonLabels).

namespace.description: Namespace for this PushSecret. Defaults to the release namespace when omitted.

finalizers.description: Finalizers set on this PushSecret's metadata.finalizers.
